---
title: "lab4"
author: "Kavya Bhavanam"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
---

## Step 1: Finding a website
I used Baseball Reference to get Hall of Fame 2026 data.

## Step 2: Scraping data
I used rvest to read the webpage and extract tables.

```{r}
library(rvest)

url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"
page <- read_html(url)

tables <- html_table(page)
hof <- tables[[1]]
head(hof)
```
